---
title: "02 Plot"
output: html_notebook
---

Loads `../output/full_dataset.csv`, re-derives category columns, and saves figures.

**Output:** `../output/figures/`

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
source("functions/helpers.R")

DATA    <- "../output/full_dataset.csv"
FIG_DIR <- "../output/figures"
dir.create(FIG_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

PLLPS_COLORS <- c(High = "#e74c3c", Medium = "#f39c12", Low = "#3498db")
GROUP_COLORS <- c(Membrane = "#0072B2", "Non-Membrane" = "#E69F00",
                  Cytosolic = "#009E73")

theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load}
df <- load_data(DATA)
cat(sprintf("%d proteins loaded\n", nrow(df)))
print(table(df$pLLPS_class))
```

```{r fig1-pllps-distribution}
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = `p(LLPS)`, fill = pLLPS_class)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.8, colour = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = PLLPS_COLORS) +
  labs(x = "p(LLPS)", y = "Count", fill = "Class",
       title = "pLLPS score distribution")
p
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig1_pllps_distribution.png"), p,
       width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r fig2-membrane-vs-nonmembrane}
df_mem <- df |>
  mutate(Group = ifelse(
    sapply(location_categories, \(x) "Plasma membrane" %in% x),
    "Membrane", "Non-Membrane"
  ))

p <- ggplot(df_mem, aes(x = Group, y = `p(LLPS)`, fill = Group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = TRUE, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = GROUP_COLORS) +
  labs(x = "", y = "p(LLPS)", title = "Membrane vs Non-Membrane") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
p
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig2_membrane_vs_nonmembrane.png"), p,
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r fig4-by-location}
loc_long <- df |>
  unnest(cols = location_categories) |>
  filter(!is.na(location_categories), nzchar(location_categories))

top_locs <- loc_long |>
  count(location_categories) |>
  slice_max(n, n = 10) |>
  pull(location_categories)

order_locs <- loc_long |>
  filter(location_categories %in% top_locs) |>
  group_by(location_categories) |>
  summarise(med = median(`p(LLPS)`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(med)) |>
  pull(location_categories)

p <- loc_long |>
  filter(location_categories %in% top_locs) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(location_categories, levels = order_locs), y = `p(LLPS)`)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "#009E73", alpha = 0.55, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white",
               colour = "#333333", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "", y = "p(LLPS)", title = "p(LLPS) by subcellular location, all proteins (top 10)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
p
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig4_by_location.png"), p,
       width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r setup-membrane}
# Membrane flag — use Is_Membrane column if present (Python wrangle),
# else derive from location_categories
if ("Is_Membrane" %in% names(df)) {
  df$Is_Membrane <- as.logical(df$Is_Membrane)
} else {
  df$Is_Membrane <- sapply(df$location_categories,
    function(x) "Plasma membrane" %in% x)
}
mem <- df |> filter(Is_Membrane)
CUTOFF <- 0.6
cat(sprintf("Membrane subset: %d proteins\n", nrow(mem)))
```

```{r fig5-kde-distributions}
# A: all proteins
p_all <- ggplot(df, aes(x = `p(LLPS)`)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 50,
                 fill = "#aaaaaa", alpha = 0.3, colour = NA) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "#333333") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = CUTOFF, colour = "#e74c3c",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "p(LLPS)", y = "Density",
       title = sprintf("All proteins  (n=%s)", format(nrow(df), big.mark = ",")))

# B: membrane vs non-membrane
df_grp <- df |> mutate(Group = ifelse(Is_Membrane, "Membrane", "Non-Membrane"))
n_lab  <- df_grp |> count(Group) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(Group, "  n=", format(n, big.mark = ",")))
label_map <- setNames(n_lab$label, n_lab$Group)

p_mem <- ggplot(df_grp, aes(x = `p(LLPS)`, colour = Group)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = CUTOFF, colour = "#e74c3c",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = GROUP_COLORS, labels = label_map) +
  labs(x = "p(LLPS)", y = "Density", colour = NULL,
       title = "Membrane vs Non-Membrane")

# C: by TMD count (0-6 individually, 7+ pooled)
df_tmd <- df |>
  mutate(tmd_grp = factor(
    ifelse(TMD_count <= 6, as.character(TMD_count), "7+"),
    levels = c(as.character(0:6), "7+")
  ))
tmd_counts <- df_tmd |> count(tmd_grp)

# TMD > 0 only — exclude the TMD=0 group
tmd_counts_pos <- tmd_counts |> filter(tmd_grp != "0", n >= 20)

p_tmd <- if (nrow(tmd_counts_pos) == 0) {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
             label = "No TMD > 0 data\nRun enrich_dataset_with_tmd.py",
             colour = "gray", size = 4) +
    theme_void() + labs(title = "By TMD count  (TMD > 0 only)")
} else {
  df_tmd |>
    filter(tmd_grp != "0") |>
    semi_join(tmd_counts_pos, by = "tmd_grp") |>
    ggplot(aes(x = `p(LLPS)`, colour = tmd_grp)) +
    geom_density(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = CUTOFF, colour = "#e74c3c",
               linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_colour_viridis_d(
      labels = setNames(
        paste0("TMD=", tmd_counts_pos$tmd_grp, "  n=",
               format(tmd_counts_pos$n, big.mark = ",")),
        tmd_counts_pos$tmd_grp
      )
    ) +
    labs(x = "p(LLPS)", y = "Density", colour = NULL,
         title = "By TMD count  (TMD > 0 only)") +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(ncol = 2))
}

p_all; p_mem; p_tmd
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig5a_kde_all.png"),      p_all, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig5b_kde_membrane.png"), p_mem, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig5c_kde_tmd.png"),      p_tmd, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r fig6-membrane-by-function}
func_mem <- mem |>
  unnest(cols = function_categories) |>
  filter(!is.na(function_categories), nzchar(function_categories))

top_funcs_mem <- func_mem |>
  count(function_categories) |>
  slice_max(n, n = 10) |>
  pull(function_categories)

func_mem <- func_mem |> filter(function_categories %in% top_funcs_mem)

order_func_mem <- func_mem |>
  group_by(function_categories) |>
  summarise(med = median(`p(LLPS)`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(med)) |>
  pull(function_categories)

p_v <- ggplot(func_mem,
  aes(x = factor(function_categories, levels = order_func_mem), y = `p(LLPS)`)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "#0072B2", alpha = 0.6, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white") +
  labs(x = "", y = "p(LLPS)",
       title = sprintf("Membrane proteins by function  (top 10 by count, n=%s)",
                       format(nrow(mem), big.mark = ","))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_v
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig6_membrane_by_function.png"), p_v, width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r fig7-membrane-by-location}
loc_mem <- mem |>
  unnest(cols = location_categories) |>
  filter(!is.na(location_categories), nzchar(location_categories))

top_locs_mem <- loc_mem |>
  count(location_categories) |>
  slice_max(n, n = 10) |>
  pull(location_categories)

order_locs_mem <- loc_mem |>
  filter(location_categories %in% top_locs_mem) |>
  group_by(location_categories) |>
  summarise(med = median(`p(LLPS)`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(med)) |>
  pull(location_categories)

df_loc_plot <- loc_mem |> filter(location_categories %in% top_locs_mem)

p_v <- ggplot(df_loc_plot,
  aes(x = factor(location_categories, levels = order_locs_mem), y = `p(LLPS)`)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "#009E73", alpha = 0.6, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white") +
  labs(x = "", y = "p(LLPS)", title = "Membrane proteins by location (top 10)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_v
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig7_membrane_by_location.png"), p_v, width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r fig8-pct-above-cutoff-function}
overall_pct <- 100 * mean(mem[["p(LLPS)"]] > CUTOFF, na.rm = TRUE)

func_stats <- mem |>
  unnest(cols = function_categories) |>
  filter(!is.na(function_categories), nzchar(function_categories)) |>
  group_by(function_categories) |>
  summarise(
    n       = n(),
    n_above = sum(`p(LLPS)` > CUTOFF, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n_above / n) |>
  filter(n > 10) |>
  arrange(pct)

p <- ggplot(func_stats,
  aes(x = reorder(function_categories, pct), y = pct)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#0072B2", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("n=", n)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3, colour = "#333333") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = overall_pct, colour = "#e74c3c",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = overall_pct,
           label = sprintf(" Overall %.1f%%", overall_pct),
           colour = "#e74c3c", size = 3.2, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "", y = sprintf("%% with p(LLPS) > %.1f", CUTOFF),
       title = sprintf("Fraction above p(LLPS) %.1f by function  (membrane proteins, n > 10)", CUTOFF))
p
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig8_pct_above_cutoff_function.png"), p, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r fig9-pct-above-cutoff-location}
loc_stats <- mem |>
  unnest(cols = location_categories) |>
  filter(!is.na(location_categories), nzchar(location_categories)) |>
  group_by(location_categories) |>
  summarise(
    n       = n(),
    n_above = sum(`p(LLPS)` > CUTOFF, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n_above / n) |>
  filter(n > 10) |>
  arrange(pct)

p <- ggplot(loc_stats,
  aes(x = reorder(location_categories, pct), y = pct)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#009E73", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("n=", n)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3, colour = "#333333") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = overall_pct, colour = "#e74c3c",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = overall_pct,
           label = sprintf(" Overall %.1f%%", overall_pct),
           colour = "#e74c3c", size = 3.2, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "", y = sprintf("%% with p(LLPS) > %.1f", CUTOFF),
       title = sprintf("Fraction above p(LLPS) %.1f by location  (membrane proteins, n > 10)", CUTOFF))
p
ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "fig9_pct_above_cutoff_location.png"), p, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r summary}
cat("Figures saved to:", normalizePath(FIG_DIR), "\n")
cat(list.files(FIG_DIR, pattern = "\\.png$"), sep = "\n")
```
